title: nicipe oreogenes
intro_study: According to the study in "Saudi journal of biological sciences", nicotiana glauca, also known as nicipe oreogenes, benefits include exhibiting antibacterial properties, as its extracts were found to inhibit the growth of E. coli and S. aureus bacteria.
side_effects: Nicipe oreogenes can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts may also lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and electrolyte imbalance due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In rare cases, excessive intake of nicipe oreogenes has been linked to liver damage and kidney failure. Furthermore, the plant's high levels of alkaloids can cause respiratory problems and interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
